name: before-after-wipe
title: Before After Wipe
description: Two full-bleed content slots compare before and after states as a persistent divider wipes the after layer over the before layer and rests at a configurable split. Callers fill the named before/after slot panels; token-styled defaults render when a slot is left empty.
evidence: Wave J U-B: comparison-split divider-wipe mechanic ported onto real content slots

variables.label: Before label
variables.description: Chip shown on the base before panel. Blank hides the chip.

variables.label: After label
variables.description: Chip shown on the revealed after panel. Blank hides the chip.

variables.label: Resting split
variables.description: Divider resting position after the wipe lands.

variables.label: Wipe start
variables.description: Seconds after mount start when the wipe begins.

variables.label: Accent
variables.description: Divider handle and after chip color.

variables.label: Exit
variables.description: Outgoing transition. None holds the final comparison frame.
